name: std-wizard
description: std-wizard — generic N-step data-collection wizard (Vercel deploy / GitHub repo create / Stripe Connect onboarding style). Each step has its own form fields. Topology = loading / running / completed / cancelled / error. ADVANCE is guard-routed: not-last-step advances; last-step transitions to completed. Distinct from std-step-flow (approval-decision) — wizard collects data via form-section per step, step-flow collects yes/no decisions.

schema.name: std-wizard
schema.description: std-wizard — generic N-step data-collection wizard (Vercel deploy / GitHub repo create / Stripe Connect onboarding style). Each step has its own form fields. Topology = loading / running / completed / cancelled / error. ADVANCE is guard-routed: not-last-step advances; last-step transitions to completed. Distinct from std-step-flow (approval-decision) — wizard collects data via form-section per step, step-flow collects yes/no decisions.

fields.name: title
fields.description: The descriptive name for this wizard view.

fields.name: description
fields.description: A brief explanation of the step's purpose or content.

fields.name: category
fields.description: Indicates the field's intended audience or area of focus.

fields.name: priority
fields.description: Indicates the relative importance or urgency of the wizard.

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Free-form textual remarks or additional information.

fields.name: wizardSteps
fields.description: An ordered list of steps within the wizard process.

fields.name: currentStepIndex
fields.description: The numerical index of the currently displayed step.

fields.name: totalSteps
fields.description: The total number of steps in the wizard.

fields.name: currentStepLabel
fields.description: The text displayed for the currently active step.
fields.synonyms: step title, step name, current step

fields.name: currentStepDescription
fields.description: A brief explanation of the current step's purpose.
fields.synonyms: step description, step details, step explanation

fields.name: currentStepIcon
fields.description: Icon representing the current step in the process.

fields.name: currentFields
fields.description: The data currently being displayed in the form.
fields.synonyms: form data, input values, field values

fields.name: isFirstStep
fields.description: Indicates if this is the initial step in the wizard.

fields.name: isLastStep
fields.description: Indicates whether this is the final step in the wizard.

fields.name: primaryActionLabel
fields.description: Text displayed for the primary action button.
fields.synonyms: button text, action label, primary button

fields.name: primaryActionIcon
fields.description: Icon representing the primary action button.

fields.name: completionMessage
fields.description: Text displayed upon successful completion of the wizard.
fields.synonyms: success message, confirmation text, final message

fields.name: cancelReason
fields.description: The reason provided for cancelling the wizard process.
fields.synonyms: cancellation reason, cancel explanation, dismissal reason

fields.name: errorMessage
fields.description: Error message displayed when a process fails.

emits.description: Signals progression to the next step in the wizard.
Aborts the wizard process, discarding any unsaved data.
Indicates the user has abandoned the data collection process.
Initiates a reset of the wizard's state and data.
Signals the wizard has finished loading and is ready.
Indicates the wizard failed to load initial data.
Indicates successful data submission within the wizard.
Indicates a failure to save wizard data.

events.name: Wizard loaded
events.description: Signals the wizard has finished loading and is ready.

events.name: Wizard load failed
events.description: Indicates the wizard failed to load initial data.

events.name: Wizard saved
events.description: Indicates successful data submission within the wizard.

events.name: Wizard save failed
events.description: Indicates a failure to save wizard data.

events.name: Advance
events.description: Signals progression to the next step in the wizard.

events.name: Retreat
events.description: Aborts the wizard process, discarding any unsaved data.

events.name: Cancel
events.description: Indicates the user has abandoned the data collection process.

events.name: Restart
events.description: Initiates a reset of the wizard's state and data.

effects: All steps completed. Your submission has been recorded.

children.content: The wizard was cancelled. No data was submitted.

title.label: Wizard title
title.description: Heading shown across all wizard steps

cardLook.label: Card look
cardLook.description: Layer 2 visual treatment for cards rendered by this atom.

steps.label: Steps
steps.description: Ordered steps with their label, icon, and form fields
